summary: Comprehensive testing of backend refactor + 2 new features (POST /api/search and POST /api/compare with optional URL). 20/20 backend pytest cases pass and 21/21 frontend Playwright assertions pass. All previously existing endpoints still work after the server.py split into routes/*.py modules. New /api/search returns proper case-insensitive matches with before/match/after snippets and supports doc_id filtering. New /api/compare URL flow scrapes httpbin.org, returns __url__<domain> key with is_external=true, source_url, and source_chunks. Frontend SearchTab renders <mark> highlights and per-doc cards; CompareTab '+ Compare vs URL' chip toggles the URL input correctly and the EXTERNAL pill + source_url anchor render in the URL pane. Chat regression confirmed: chat-input/send-btn work, toggle-sources-btn correctly absent.

issues: Recharts width(0)/height(0) console warnings before container has size. Cosmetic; chart still renders. Likely needs ResponsiveContainer minWidth/minHeight props.

critical_code_review_comments: routes/compare.py: catching generic `except Exception` around urlparse re-raises HTTPException correctly, but the bare except will swallow the HTTPException raised inside the try (currently fine because urlparse rarely raises, but tighten to catch ValueError only).

routes/search.py: `total_matches` is incremented by len(snippets) (capped at max_snippets=3 per chunk) but `match_count` per doc uses pattern.findall on full chunk text — these two metrics use different definitions which is slightly confusing for users (totals < sum of per-doc match_counts).
Document Map Recharts container reports width/height = 0/-1 on initial mount — wrap in ResponsiveContainer with min dimensions or render after layout.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_rag_api.py (added TestSearch class with 6 tests + 4 new TestCompare URL tests)
test_credentials: None — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: DB now contains 4 docs: Course List Data Science DOCX (7 chunks), Anlage_DataScience_Msc PDF (6 chunks), httpbin.org URL (7 chunks), test_ai.txt (1 chunk). Test added 1 more test_ai.txt during this iteration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Set REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var before running pytest: `export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://smart-search-compare.preview.emergentagent.com`. The test file /app/backend/tests/test_rag_api.py covers all 6 backend modules end-to-end including SSE-less chat, compare (docs + URL + URL+docs), search (empty/short/valid/case-insens/filter/no-match), visualize, export PDF. Frontend selectors confirmed: tab-search, search-query-input, search-submit-btn, search-summary, search-doc-{id}, search-empty-state; compare-add-url-btn, compare-url-pill, compare-url-input, compare-url-remove, compare-submit-btn, compare-query-input, compare-error.
rca of the issue: No bugs found — backend refactor is clean, both new features fully functional end-to-end.
